description: You are a broadcast set designer for Channel 7 Local News. The station is moving to a new downtown facility. Using the provided building shell in Sweet Home 3D, design a fully zoned local TV news broadcast facility. Create partition walls to divide the space into at least four functional rooms named 'Control Room', 'Green Room', 'Makeup', and 'Studio Floor'. Furnish the Studio Floor with an anchor desk setup (at least one desk and two chairs) and studio grid lighting (at least four fixtures). The Production Control Room must include a master control console (at least three desks) and technical equipment (at least six screens), with at least four monitors wall-mounted at an elevation of 80 cm or higher. Furnish the Talent Prep Areas with at least one sofa and one sink. Use a minimum of 40 items from the built-in catalog across the facility and save the project.
